hero.title: Your IRS filed with surgical precision
hero.subtitle: Upload your broker's CSV or Excel. Fiscus automatically calculates gains and losses from stocks, ETFs, dividends, interest and cryptocurrencies — and fills the AT annexes.

features.title:
Everything you need to declare,
calculated automatically
features.subtitle: Fiscus supports all types of capital income and capital gains required by the AT Model 3.

stocks.title: Stocks & ETFs
stocks.desc: Automatic calculation of capital gains and losses using FIFO method. Purchase lots, dates, commissions and adjusted cost basis.

dividends.title: Dividends
dividends.desc: Complete list of all dividend payments with dates, gross values, withholding tax and country of origin.

interest.title: Interest
interest.desc: Interest from bonds, deposits and savings accounts. Payment dates, rates applied and withholding already deducted by the broker.

crypto.title: Cryptocurrencies
crypto.desc: Tracking of crypto purchases and sales with automatic FIFO application. Gains, losses, gas fees and conversions.

howItWorks.title:
In three steps,
your tax return ready
howItWorks.subtitle: No installations, no account creation, no data sent to servers. All processing happens directly in your browser.

steps.title: Upload your file
steps.desc: Export the CSV or Excel from your broker — Interactive Brokers, DEGIRO, Trading212, Revolut, eToro and more. Or import the AT XML directly.

steps.title: The engine calculates
steps.desc: Fiscus automatically applies Portuguese tax rules: FIFO method, stock split treatment, accumulated interest and withholdings.

steps.title: Export for AT
steps.desc: View all calculated values and export the Modelo 3 XML ready to submit on the Portal das Finanças, with annexes J, E and G filled.

atIntegration.title:
Import the AT XML.
Fill the annexes.
atIntegration.subtitle: Import the XML file you downloaded from the Portal das Finanças. Fiscus automatically fills all tables and fields of the annexes — no copy-paste needed.
features: Annex J, Field 9 — foreign securities income
Annex E, Field 5 — dividends, interest and other capital income
Annex G, Field 9 — capital gains and losses on securities disposal
Automatic validation of NIF, IBAN and mandatory fields
Export of validated XML ready for tax filing

privacy.title:
Your data never
leaves your computer
privacy.subtitle: Fiscus runs entirely in the browser. No files are sent to servers. No data is stored. Close the tab and everything disappears.

noServer.title: No server
noServer.desc: All processing happens locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

noAccount.title: No account
noAccount.desc: No need to create an account, or provide email or personal data. Open the browser and start using.

noTracking.title: No tracking
noTracking.desc: No analytics cookies, no telemetry, no tracking. What you do in Fiscus is yours exclusively.

brokers.title:
Compatible with the main
brokers used in Portugal
brokers.subtitle: Don't find your broker? The generic CSV format accepts any export with date, ticker, quantity and price columns.

cta.title:
Ready to file
without headaches?
cta.subtitle: Fiscus processes your files locally, applies Portuguese tax rules and generates XML for the AT. Free, private, in-browser.
cta.uploadSubtitle: CSV, XLSX, XLS or AT XML
cta.note: // No account · No installation · 100% local data · Free
